import io
import string
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let nums = parse_tokens(line1)
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  let len = list.len(nums)
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut a = 0
  while a < len and not found
    mut b = a + 1
    while b < len and not found
      let va = get_at(nums, a)
      let vb = get_at(nums, b)
      if va + vb == target
        found = true
        fi = a
        fj = b
      end
      b = b + 1
    end
    a = a + 1
  end

  if found
    print("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    print("none")
  end
end
